title: The Colosseum and the Rebellion Converge
description: Pages 1–4 focus on the colosseum and the rebellion converge, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Don Chinjao, Luffy, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as the Colosseum fighters, Tontatta rebellion, and Straw Hat alliance move closer to the same target: Doflamingo’s hidden system.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Smash that legend!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nuuu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Crimch

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hiyahoho you've got spunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You think I'm gonna lose to you!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Go, Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Give it your all, Chinjo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What a Wild One- On-One!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The combatants are already moving too fast for me to see what's going on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But we sure can feel their iron wills!! What we have here, before our eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is without a doubt the most intense battle to take place here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've no hope.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Since our fair colosseum was Estab- Lished!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You of the "Worst Genera- lion" are nothing but a bunch of laughably over- confident brats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You'll never surpass the sea that WE fought over!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whitebeard is gone, and now we've come to the next age.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The only one who's put on much of a show at all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: is that guy, "Blackbeard" teach.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Black- Beard!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Your strength is still far too lacking to even dream of bearing your fangs at me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Give up on being a pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A man like Rayleigh must have really lost it if his idea of a representative for the new genera- Tion is a brat such as yourself!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines had just the right idea, two years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: When they Elimi- nated ace from this world, and with him his demonic blood- line and the seed of evil that he rep- resented!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You think you stand a chance against the admirable and the emperors!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You think you can surpass Roger!? How utterly Ridicu- Louis!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Rocket !!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy has...!! He's jumped!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just try me. Yes, receive your baptism!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And what a jump it is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: My 30 year Grudge Against Garp...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All my resent- ment... every- thing I've got, in one attack!!! Prepare yourself, strawhat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What the!? What's with this ice?

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on the colosseum and the rebellion converge, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
